description: The Set Position node tells a IPlayable to jump to a position upon impulse.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]):
=== Target (IPlayable) ===

The IPlayable to set the position on.
fields.NormalizedPosition:
Set the position of the playback on the target.
Note this is position, so the value is equivalent to seconds.
fields.Next: Sends an impulse after the initial call.
